title: NATIONAL DOMESTIC VIOLENCE HOTLINE - 211info
text: NATIONAL DOMESTIC VIOLENCE HOTLINE NATIONAL DOMESTIC VIOLENCE HOTLINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides confidential and anonymous crisis intervention, education, safety planning, and local referrals to anyone affected by intimate partner violence. Advocates have access to a database of local service providers and national resources throughout country. Offers dedicated hotlines for deaf, deafblind, or hard of hearing individuals. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (800) 799-7233 1-800-799 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Hotline (800) 799-7233 1-800-799-SAFE Hotline (855) 812-1001 Deaf Video Phone [email protected] Text Short Code 88788 Text START INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, or text for more information. Visit website for live chat. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Nationwide (including US territories) Services: Domestic Violence Hotlines Domestic Violence Hotlines * Blindness Domestic Violence Hotlines * Deafness Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - LOVE IS RESPECT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
